'''鈭歡-j-g-p''' ('''kagajgepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cadaverate|cadaverate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-j-g-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cadaverate|cadaverate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-j-g-p
|-
! Lemma
| kagajgepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigajgepoko|thigajgepoko]] || [[word:jigajgepoko|jigajgepoko]] || [[word:shigajgepoko|shigajgepoko]] || [[word:kigajgepoko|kigajgepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugajgepoko|thuthugajgepoko]] || [[word:jujugajgepoko|jujugajgepoko]] || [[word:shushugajgepoko|shushugajgepoko]] || [[word:kukugajgepoko|kukugajgepoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
